prompt: Create a high-fashion editorial photograph for Vogue Italia: a single tall female model standing barefoot ankle-deep in floodwater in a grand Venetian piazza at golden hour, centered in a symmetrical corridor of historic marble arcades and columns on both sides. She wears a dramatic crimson red silk chiffon sleeveless evening gown with a deep V neckline, fitted waist, full flowing skirt, and translucent hem; the fabric trails and billows to her right in a soft breeze. Her face is softly obscured by motion or shallow focus, her dark hair is windblown, and her pose is poised and statuesque, looking upward and slightly left. The flooded square forms a mirror-like canal, reflecting the model, columns, peach sky, and distant Venetian domes and bell towers; include gentle ripples around her legs and a few floating fashion magazine pages and flower petals on the water. Use warm sunset light, cinematic peach-and-gold sky, elegant muted stone architecture, realistic medium-format film look, Vogue Italia luxury editorial styling, shallow depth of field, soft grain, 80mm lens feel, balanced central composition, refined color grading, no crowd, no modern clutter except the floating editorial pages. Add a small white bottom-right caption reading VOGUE ITALIA / 2024 / Acqua Alta.
